title: gymnogramma decurrens
intro: Gymnogramma decurrens, also known as the running fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Compositae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Gymnogramma decurrens include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
